sanity.description: Run PowerShell syntax and cross-file version consistency checks.

rust.description: Run cargo fmt --check, cargo test --locked, and cargo clippy --locked --all-targets -D warnings.

gateway-fast.description: Run the pure-Python gateway protocol suites that do not require the synced native extension.

gateway-native.description: Build and sync the native gateway extension, then run the gateway-native protocol suites.

python-discovery.description: Build and sync the native gateway extension, then run the full manifest-defined Python unittest suite.

gateway-smoke.description: Build and sync the native gateway extension, then exercise gateway CLI/version/initialize smoke checks.

python-native.description: Run the aggregate native Python gate: gateway-native, python-discovery, and gateway-smoke.

full.description: Run the complete local check gate: sanity, rust, and the aggregate python-native profile.
